_**Agent (default)**_

The build failed because of a YAML typo in the post frontmatter, not a template bug.

In `instant-pot-chicken-adobo.md`, the first tag was written as a nested list:

```yaml
tags:
  - - Chicken Adobo   # parses as ["Chicken Adobo"], not "Chicken Adobo"
```

When the template ran `urlize` on that tag at line 79 of `blog/single.html`, Hugo got a slice instead of a string and threw the error.

I changed it to:

```yaml
tags:
  - Chicken Adobo
```

The site builds successfully now (1434 pages, no errors). Redeploy and it should pass.
